title: Can
description: A mod made more for my friends about Create.
body:
**THIS MODPACK IS SOLELY MADE FOR THE PURPOSE OF ME AND MY FRIENDS! DON'T EXPECT REGULAR UPDATES!**

Sorry if you were looking for cans, but this modpack is about create! Mainly create, performance enhancing dru- I mean mods, and a few other things. Yet again, don't expect regular updates (like people will use this modpack), its only goal is to make it easier for my friends to get it. Now, why "**c a n**" you may ask? Just a inside joke...
